releases.description:
## 🔧 Obsidian Community Submission Review Fixes                                                                  
                                                                                                                    
  This release addresses all warnings from the official Obsidian community plugin review, ensuring full compliance  
  with Obsidian API guidelines and code quality standards.                                                          
                                                                                                                    
  **No functional changes** — All fixes are code quality improvements. Your existing wiki, settings, and content    
  remain intact.
                                                                                                                    
  ---                                                             

  ## 📋 What Was Fixed                                                                                              
   
  ### API Compliance (7 locations)                                                                                  
  **Replaced deprecated `activeWindow.setTimeout` → `window.setTimeout`**
  - Why: Obsidian API guidelines require using standard `window` API instead of Electron's deprecated `activeWindow`
  - Locations:                                                                                                      
    - `llm-client.ts`: Network retry delays (2 places)                                                              
    - `auto-maintain.ts`: Temp path cleanup, debounce timer, startup delay (3 places)                               
    - `wiki-engine.ts`: API delay, batch delay (2 places)                                                           
  - Impact: Zero functional change, improves Electron compatibility                                                 
                                                                                                                    
  ### Type Safety (2 warnings fixed)                                                                                
  **Added proper type assertion to `loadData()` result**                                                            
  ```typescript                                                                                                     
  // Before (unsafe any)                                                                                            
  const savedData = await this.loadData();                                                                          
  this.settings = Object.assign({}, DEFAULT_SETTINGS, savedData);                                                   
                                                                                                                    
  // After (safe typed)                                                                                             
  const savedData = await this.loadData() as Partial<LLMWikiSettings> | null;                                       
  this.settings = Object.assign({}, DEFAULT_SETTINGS, savedData || {});      
```                                       
  - Fixes: Unsafe any assignment and unsafe .wikiLanguage member access                                             
  - Backward compatible: || {} null protection ensures old user data loads correctly                                
                                                                                                                    
  CSS Format Consistency (4 locations)                                                                              
                                                                                                                    
  Expanded short hex colors to 6-digit format                                                                       
  - styles.css lines 74, 87, 120, 131                                                                               
  - Changed: #666 → #666666, #ddd → #dddddd, #999 → #999999                                                         
  - Why: Obsidian CSS guidelines require full 6-digit hex format for consistency
  - Impact: Visual appearance unchanged (same colors), just format standardized                                     
                                                                                                                    
  Code Quality (2 improvements)                                                                                     
                                                                                                                    
  - Removed unused parameter: Deleted _retryError in catch block (wiki-engine.ts)                                   
  - Replaced deprecated dependency: builtin-modules → Node.js native module.builtinModules                          
    - Why: builtin-modules package marked as deprecated by Obsidian review                                          
    - Solution: Use Node.js v16+ built-in API instead                                                               
    - Impact: Build process unchanged, eliminates third-party dependency                                            
                                                                                                                    
  ---                                                                                                               
  📦 Installation                                                                                                   
                                                                  
  Manual Installation (Recommended)
                                                                                                                    
  1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` from this release                                                  
  2. In Obsidian, go to `Settings` → `Community plugins`                                                                
  3. Click the folder icon on the Installed plugins tab to open your plugins directory                              
  4. Create a new folder named `karpathywiki`                                                                    
  5. Drop the three files inside                                                                                    
  6. Back in Obsidian, click the refresh icon                                                                       
  7. Find `Karpathy LLM Wiki` in the list, toggle it on                                                               
                                                                                                                    
  Development Build                                                                                                 
  ```                                                                                                                  
  git clone https://github.com/green-dalii/obsidian-llm-wiki                                                        
  cd obsidian-llm-wiki                                                                                              
  pnpm install                                                                                                      
  pnpm build                                                                                                        
 ```                                                                                                                   
  ---                                                                                                               
  🔧 Upgrade from v1.7.7                                                                                            
                                                                                                                    
  Direct upgrade — no special steps required                      
                                                                                                                    
  Your existing wiki content (pages in wiki/), plugin settings, and schema configuration are stored in your vault   
  root, not in the plugin folder. Simply replace the plugin files:                                                  
                                                                                                                    
  1. Disable the plugin in Settings → Community plugins                                                             
  2. Delete .obsidian/plugins/karpathywiki/ folder
  3. Install fresh with new files from this release                                                                 
  4. Enable the plugin — all your wiki data persists                                                                
                                                                                                                    
  ---                                                                                                               
  ✅ Verification                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                    
  All fixes verified:                                             
  - pnpm lint: 0 errors (meets Obsidian Bot requirements)                                                           
  - pnpm build: Success (new dependency system working)                                                             
  - Functional tests: No changes to ingestion, query, lint, or maintenance                                          
  - Backward compatibility: Old settings load correctly with type-safe code                                         
                                                                                                                    
  ---                                                                                                               
  📋 Full Changelog                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                    
  See `CHANGELOG.md` for detailed technical changes since v1.7.7.                                                     
                                                                                                                    
  ---                                                             
  🙏 Credits                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                    
  - Concept: https://gist.github.com/karpathy/442a6bf555914893e9891c11519de94f
  - Author: Greener-Dalii                                                                                           
  - Platform: https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Getting+started/Build+a+plugin

## 🔄 Plugin ID Changed

  **Important:** Plugin ID changed from `llm-wiki` to `karpathywiki` to avoid conflict with existing plugin and follow Obsidian naming guidelines (no "obsidian" word in ID).
                                                                                                                    
  **No functionality changes** — only identifier update for community submission.                                   
   
  ---                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                  
  ## ✨ New Features                                                                                                
   
  ### Smart Skip for Batch Ingestion                                                                                
  Folder batch ingestion now automatically detects and skips already-processed files, saving time and API costs:  
  - Checks if `wiki/sources/${slug}.md` exists → considers file ingested                                            
  - Conservative fallback: skips even if frontmatter malformed (protects user edits)                                
  - Report shows: "Skipped (already ingested): 3/10 files"                                                          
                                                                                                                    
  ### Save-to-Wiki Quality Improvements (5 fixes)                                                                   
  - **Conversation summary pages**: Now use LLM prompts (same as file ingestion), proper frontmatter fields         
  - **Duplicate save prevention**: Hash tracking stops re-evaluation of unchanged conversations                     
  - **Progress notice reliability**: Guaranteed dismissal with try-finally cleanup                                  
  - **Save reports**: Shows entity/concept counts, elapsed time, contradictions                                     
  - **i18n compliance**: All notices respect Interface Language setting (7 new texts)                               
                                                                                                                    
  ---                                                                                                               
                                                                                                                    
  ## 📦 Installation                                                                                                
                                                                                                                  
  ### Manual Installation (Recommended)                                                                             
                                                                                                                  
  1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` from this release                                            
  2. In Obsidian, go to **Settings → Community plugins**                                                          
  3. Click the **folder icon** on the Installed plugins tab to open your plugins directory                          
  4. Create a new folder named **`karpathywiki`** (not `llm-wiki`)                                                  
  5. Drop the three files inside                                                                                    
  6. Back in Obsidian, click the **refresh icon**                                                                   
  7. Find **Karpathy LLM Wiki** in the list, toggle it on                                                           
                                                                                                                    
  ### Development Build                                                                                             
  ```bash                                                                                                           
  git clone https://github.com/green-dalii/obsidian-llm-wiki                                                        
  pnpm install                                                                                                      
  pnpm build                                                                                            
  ```
                                                                                               
  ---                                                                                                               
  🔧 Upgrade from v1.7.6                                          
                                                                                                                    
  If upgrading from llm-wiki (old ID):                            
                                                                                                                    
  1. Disable the old plugin in Settings → Community plugins                                                         
  2. Delete the .obsidian/plugins/llm-wiki/ folder manually                                                         
  3. Install fresh with the new ID karpathywiki (see steps above)                                                   
  4. Your existing wiki content (pages, settings, schema) remains intact — stored in your vault root, not plugin    
  folder                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                    
  ---                                                                                                               
  📋 Full Changelog                                               
                                                                                                                    
  See CHANGELOG.md for detailed changes since v1.7.6.
                                                                                                                    
  ---                                                             
  🙏 Credits                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                    
  - Concept: https://gist.github.com/karpathy/442a6bf555914893e9891c11519de94f
  - Author: Greener-Dalii                                                                                           
  - Platform: https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Getting+started/Build+a+plugin

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/green-dalii/obsidian-llm-wiki/compare/1.7.0...1.7.7

releases.description:
## 🚀 Major Features                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Ingestion Parallel Acceleration (v1.7.3)                                                                                                               
  - **Configurable page generation concurrency** (1-5, default 1) for up to 3x speedup on sources with 50+ entities                                          
  - **Promise.allSettled error isolation** — single page failure doesn't block batch, with per-page exponential backoff retry                                
  - **Batch delay control** (100-2000ms) for API rate limit protection                                                                                       
  - Progress tracking with real-time batch completion logs                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Intelligent Multi-Source Merge (v1.7.2) — Critical Fix                                                                                                 
  - **Fixes knowledge loss on page update**: Frontmatter `sources` array now programmatically appended (not overwritten)                                     
  - **Frontmatter preservation**: `created` date preserved, `updated` date refreshed, `reviewed: true` flag protected                                        
  - **Three-mode merge architecture**:                                                                                                                       
    - New pages: Full LLM-generated content with complete structure                                                                                          
    - Existing pages: LLM performs intelligent body merge following schema-defined sections                                                                  
    - Reviewed pages: Minimal append-only mode preserving user edits                                                                                         
  - **NO_NEW_CONTENT signal**: Skip redundant updates when source adds nothing new                                                                           
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Verbatim Mentions Preservation (v1.7.3)                                                                                                                
  - Source quotes in `mentions_in_source` kept in original language                                                                                          
  - Optional translation in parentheses when wiki language differs from source                                                                               
  - LLM prompt explicitly instructs: preserve verbatim, translation as appendix only                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Entity/Concept Relationship Enhancement (v1.7.3)                                                                                                       
  - Separate "Related Entities" and "Related Concepts" sections (replaces generic "Related Content")                                                         
  - Analysis phase extracts both `related_entities` and `related_concepts` for all items                                                                     
  - Bidirectional relationship tracking with proper wiki-link syntax                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                             
  ---                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                             
  ## ✨ Additional Improvements                                   

  ### Multi-Folder Auto-Watch (v1.7.1)                                                                                                                       
  - `watchedFolders` array replaces single `watchedFolder` — watch any number of folders
  - "Add Folder" buttons in settings with folder picker modal                                                                                                
  - Web Clipper preset: one-click adds `Clippings/` folder                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Semantic Entity Deduplication (v1.7.1)                                                                                                                 
  - LLM fallback when slug matching fails                                                                                                                    
  - Handles translations ("Tsinghua University" ↔ "清华大学"), abbreviations, renamings                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Schema Template Optimization (v1.7.3)                                                                                                                  
  - Explicit section structure rules for entity/concept pages                                                                                                
  - Content guidelines: verbatim mentions, naming conventions, link formats                                                                                  
  - Multi-source merge policies documented in schema                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                             
    - `MarkdownRenderer.render()` Component parameter
    - `metadataCache.on('resolved')` callback signature
  - **v1.7.1**: Entity name translation leak fixed — names preserve source language
  - **v1.7.1**: Premature iteration stop fixed — post-deduplication check
  - **v1.7.1**: `fillEmptyPage` "file not found" resolved
  - **v1.7.1**: Auto-maintain settings sync and startup noise fixes

  ---

  ## 🛠️  Technical Changes

  ### New Prompts
  - `mergeEntityPage` / `mergeConceptPage`: Schema-guided intelligent fusion
  - `appendToReviewedPage`: Minimal mode for user-reviewed content

  ### New Utilities
  - `mergeFrontmatter()`: Deterministic frontmatter merge
  - `extractBody()`: Content extraction after frontmatter
  - `yamlStringify()`: YAML array serialization

  ### API Changes
  - Added `pageGenerationConcurrency` setting (1-5)
  - Added `batchDelayMs` setting (100-2000ms)
  - Schema task: Added `'merge'` type

  ---

  ## Manual Installation

  If you prefer to install manually or the automatic update doesn't work:

  1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` (if exists) from the Assets below
  2. Create a folder named `llm-wiki` in your Obsidian vault's `.obsidian/plugins/` directory
  3. Copy the downloaded files into that folder
  4. Reload Obsidian (Cmd/Ctrl + R) or enable the plugin in Settings → Community Plugins
  5. Configure your LLM provider in the plugin settings

  **Note**: This is a beta release. For production use, wait for the stable 1.7.5 release.
releases.name: 1.7.5-beta — Ingestion Acceleration, Multi-Source Merge & TypeScript Fixes

releases.description:
## What's New in 1.7.1-beta

  ### Multi-folder Auto-Watch
  - Watch any number of folders via "Add Folder" buttons in Settings
  - Web Clipper preset: one-click adds `Clippings/` folder for seamless web-clip auto-ingestion
  - mtime-level deduplication prevents double-ingestion on external drag-drop

  ### Semantic Entity Deduplication
  - When slug matching fails, LLM semantic fallback handles translations (e.g. "Tsinghua University" ↔ "清华大学"), abbreviations, and renamings

  ### Granularity-Linked Extraction Caps
  Stop runaway iteration in standard mode. Now linked to the **Extraction Granularity** setting:

  | Granularity | Max Batches | Per-batch Quota | Cumulative Soft Cap |
  |-------------|------------|-----------------|---------------------|
  | Coarse      | 3          | 10              | ~20 items           |
  | Standard    | 6          | 20              | ~50 items           |
  | Fine        | 12         | 30              | unlimited           |

  ### Bug Fixes
  - **Entity name translation leak**: names now preserve original source language; only summaries/descriptions follow wikiLanguage
  - **Premature iteration stop**: changed to post-deduplication check (`newTotal === 0`)
  - **fillEmptyPage "file not found"**: pre-read content passed directly from lint phase
  - **watchedFolders backward compat**: older installs with string value auto-reset to `[]`
  - **autoMaintain settings sync**: changes now propagate immediately

  ### UX Improvements
  - Ingestion Notice feedback so users know the operation is running
  - Actionable network error messages after 3 retries (VPN / SSL-TLS / firewall / URL)

  ### Prompt Quality
  - Source summary: 100-200 → 150-250 words
  - Item summaries: 2-4 → 4-6 sentences with concrete facts
  - `mentions_in_source`: now requires 2-4 verbatim source quotes
  
  ### Manual Installation                                                                                                                                      

  1. Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from the assets below                                                                                    
  2. Create a folder llm-wiki inside your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/` directory                                                                                
  3. Copy the three files into that folder                                                                                                                    
  4. Enable the plugin in Settings → Community plugins                                                                                                        
  5. Configure your LLM provider and API key in the plugin settings panel                                                                                     
  6. Select the desired wiki output language in the plugin settings

## 1.7.0 — Quality Milestone                                  
                                                                                                                                                             
  This release focuses on reliability, correctness, and the user feedback loop — no new features, just making existing ones work flawlessly.                 
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Content Truncation Protection                                                                                                                          
  - All page-generation `max_tokens` raised from 1500/2000 → 8000 (entity, concept, summary, fillEmptyPage, updateRelatedPage)                               
  - Anthropic `stop_reason` and OpenAI `finish_reason` detection with automatic retry at 2x tokens (cap 16000) across all 3 LLM clients                      
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Batch Ingest Improvements                                                                                                                              
  - Folder ingest now shows an aggregated `IngestReportModal` at completion (was suppressed)                                                                 
  - Reports include entity/concept breakdown counts                                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Lint Fix Quality                                                                                                                                       
  - `fillEmptyPage` persistent "file not found" — pre-read content now bypasses string→TFile resolution
  - Lint report and command palette fully use i18n system                                                                                                    
  - `fixDeadLink` max_tokens aligned with page generation (300 → 8000)                                                                                       
  - Lint fix log enriched with per-item details                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Other Fixes                                                                                                                                            
  - Frontmatter `updated` dates normalized to current date before write                                                                                      
  - Entity name preservation: prompt enforces keeping original source language                                                                               
  - slugify: added `,()'` to punctuation filter                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Architecture                                                                                                                                           
  - wiki-engine.ts split into 7 focused modules under `src/wiki/` (engine, query-engine, source-analyzer, page-factory, conversation-ingest, lint-fixes,     
  contradictions, system-prompts)                                                                                                                            
  - UI modules under `src/ui/`, schema modules under `src/schema/`

## Manual Installation                                                                                                                                      

  1. Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from the assets below                                                                                    
  2. Create a folder llm-wiki inside your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/` directory                                                                                
  3. Copy the three files into that folder                                                                                                                    
  4. Enable the plugin in Settings → Community plugins                                                                                                        
  5. Configure your LLM provider and API key in the plugin settings panel                                                                                     
  6. Select the desired wiki output language in the plugin settings

releases.description:
# 1.6.5 — Cumulative Quality Update (v1.6.2–v1.6.5)                                    
                                                                                                                                                              
  ## Fixed                                                                               
                                                                                                                                                              
  - Wiki content language: entities, concepts, summaries, and page titles now correctly output in the selected wiki language when it differs from the UI language. Root cause: Chinese instruction text in user prompts was overriding the system-level language directive because LLMs prioritize user-prompt language signals over system-prompt instructions. All LLM-facing prompts are now in English, following the standard training pattern where English meta-instructions correctly govern target-language output.                                                                 
  - `{{` double brace JSON parse failures: normalizer dedupes prefill echo before parsing.                                                                      
  - "after JSON at position N" parse failures: normalizer extracts valid JSON prefix when trailing content exists.                                                                                                                                  
  - source_title missing validation: prompt now explicitly requires source_title; code falls back to file basename if still omitted.                                                                                                                   
  - Prefill safety: both AnthropicClient and AnthropicCompatibleClient now detect and recover from prefill { being stripped by the provider.                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                              
  ## Added                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                              
  - Iterative batch extraction: analyzeSource extracts `entities/concepts` in batches of 20, preventing the max_tokens bottleneck that limited extraction from long sources.                                                                           
  - Extraction granularity setting: `Fine / Standard / Coarse` dropdown with cost labeling.                                                                     
  - Adaptive `batch_size`: when a batch response exceeds 70% of max_tokens, the next batch automatically shrinks by 25% (floor: 5 items) to prevent output truncation.                                                                               
  - Anthropic prompt caching: static prompt prefix cached via cache_control ephemeral, reducing redundant token processing across batches.                                                                                                       
  - Entity type expansion: added product, event entity types.                                                                                                 
  - Ingestion report enhancements: elapsed time display, failed-item guidance text.                                                                           
  - API Key password masking: settings input uses password field type.                   
  - Wiki Output Language setting: 8-language dropdown (English, 中文, 日本語, 한국어, Deutsch, Français, Español, Português) with custom language input for unsupported languages. Wiki content language is now independent of the UI language setting.                                                                           
  - System prompt language directive architecture: buildWikiLanguageDirective() injects a per-task language instruction at the beginning of every LLM system prompt.                                                                              
  - Belt-and-suspenders language reinforcement: finalPrompt appends a CRITICAL LANGUAGE REQUIREMENT hint at the end of the analyzeSource user prompt. 
                                                                                                                                                              
  ## Changed                                                                                                                                                  
  
  - JSON parsing: complete rewrite with dual-layer architecture — Layer 1 normalizer (fences, {{/missing { correction, "after JSON" truncation) + Layer 2 extractor (brace counting, greedy regex fallback, LLM repair).                                                                                                                       
  - Summary quality: entity/concept summaries upgraded from 1 sentence to 2-4 sentences.                                                                      
  - analyzeSource `max_tokens`: 4000 → 16000.                                                                                                                   
  - Entity extraction balance: prompt now emphasizes extracting important entities even with low mention frequency.                                                                                                                                    
  - All LLM-facing prompts converted from bilingual to English-only: granularity instructions, batch context, merge strategies, page templates, index labels, contradiction notes, and conversation summary sections.              
  - Query engine language alignment: buildWikiContext() now emits the language directive in the system prompt.                                                                                                                                        
  - Entity types reduced from 8 to 6: removed "artifact" type (too vague, produced generic low-value pages).                                                                                                                                         
  - Backward-compatible migration: existing installations without wikiLanguage automatically inherit from the language setting.                                                                                                                        

  ---                                                                                                                                                         

  ## Manual Installation                                                                                                                                      

  1. Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from the assets below                                                                                    
  2. Create a folder llm-wiki inside your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/` directory                                                                                
  3. Copy the three files into that folder                                                                                                                    
  4. Enable the plugin in Settings → Community plugins                                                                                                        
  5. Configure your LLM provider and API key in the plugin settings panel                                                                                     
  6. Select the desired wiki output language in the plugin settings

# 1.6.1 — Quality Update                                                                 
                                                                                                                                                             
 ## Fixed                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                             
  - Query Wiki page loading: LLM-returned paths with wiki/ prefix (e.g., wiki/entities/xxx) no longer produce invalid wiki/wiki/entities/xxx.md paths; prefix
   is now stripped automatically                                                                                                                             
  - Regenerate index command: added proper async handling, progress Notice, and error feedback (was silently failing with no user indication)                
  - Index format inconsistency: removed LLM-dependent hierarchical index generation; generateIndexFromEngine now uses deterministic generateFlatIndex for all
   cases, producing consistent Obsidian-compatible Markdown                                                                                                  
  - Anthropic Compatible CORS: new AnthropicCompatibleClient uses Obsidian requestUrl instead of SDK to avoid X-Stainless-* headers causing preflight
  rejection by third-party providers                                                                                                                         
  - Anthropic Compatible model fetching: corrected endpoint URL (/v1/models), auth header (x-api-key), and fallback behavior (custom input instead of
  hardcoded Claude defaults)                                                                                                                                 
                                                                                         
 ## Added                                                                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                             
  - MiniMax provider: predefined provider with MiniMax-M2.7 default model                                                                                    
  - Lint AI Auto-Fix: fixDeadLink, fillEmptyPage, linkOrphanPage with per-item action buttons in LintReportModal                                             
  - Stub→fillEmptyPage chaining: fixDeadLink creates stub page then immediately expands with real content                                                    
                                                                                         
 ## Changed                                                                                                                                                    
                                                                                         
  - Provider list reordered: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, MiniMax, Kimi, GLM, Ollama, Custom, Anthropic Compatible                       
  - Provider names standardized: all use English sentence case with nameZh for Chinese   
  - Index generation simplified: removed generateHierarchicalIndex prompt; index is always deterministic flat format                                         
                                                
  ---                                                                                                                                                        
 ## Manual Installation                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                             
  1. Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from the assets below                                                                                   
  2. Create a folder llm-wiki inside your vault's .obsidian/plugins/ directory

  4. Enable the plugin in Settings → Community plugins

releases.description:
## What's New in 1.4.0                           
                                                                                                                                                             
  This release consolidates all Phase 1 robustness work and passes Obsidian review bot validation.
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### New Features                                                    
                                                                                                                                                             
  - **Schema Layer** — `schema/config.md`, the third layer from Karpathy's design. Human-editable config that governs LLM operation on the Wiki (naming      
  conventions, page templates, classification rules)                                                                                                         
  - **Auto-Maintenance** — file watcher + periodic lint + startup health check. All default OFF to avoid surprise API costs.                                 
  - **JSON Output Mode** — forces `response_format: { type: "json_object" }` for all structured LLM calls, eliminating malformed JSON at the source
  - **Ingestion Report Modal** — structured summary window after each ingest: created/updated pages, failed items, contradictions found                      
  - **Hierarchical Index** — LLM-generated tree-structured index grouped by type, with automatic flat fallback for large wikis (>25 pages)                   
  - **Schema Suggestion** — LLM analyzes Wiki health and proposes schema improvements                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Bug Fixes                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                             
  - **Network Resilience**: 5-min timeout + exponential backoff retry (max 3) for transient connection errors
  - **Fault Tolerance**: per-entity/concept try-catch with auto-retry; single page failure no longer aborts entire ingestion                                 
  - **JSON Parsing Robustness**: state-machine content-quote escaping + LLM repair pipeline handles unescaped quotes, trailing commas, missing commas        
  - **Index Generation Hang**: large wikis bypass LLM and use fast flat index; `max_tokens` 2000→4000                                                        
  - **API Throttling**: 300ms delay between LLM calls to prevent connection errors                                                                           
  - **Frontmatter Wikilinks**: source file references now use `[[path]]` format for clickable Obsidian links                                                 
  - **Progress Toast**: auto-dismisses when ingestion completes                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                             
  ### Compliance                                                                                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                             
  - ESLint + `eslint-plugin-obsidianmd` installed for local validation
  - All UI text uses sentence case per Obsidian guidelines                                                                                                   
  - `minAppVersion` updated to 1.4.0 to match actual API usage                                                                                               
  - TypeScript 5.9.3                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                             
  ---                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                             
  **Full Changelog**: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/green-dalii/obsidian-llm-wiki/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)

## Pre-release (Beta)                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                                        
  This is a beta pre-release of the Schema + Auto-Maintenance features. Feedback and testing are welcome.
                                                                                                                                                        
  ---                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                                        
  ## What's New                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                        
  ### Schema Layer                                                                                                                                      
  - New `wiki/schema/config.md` configuration file defining Wiki structure conventions (naming rules, page templates, category taxonomy, maintenance    
  policies)                                                                                                                                             
  - Schema content is automatically injected into all LLM system prompts for improved generation quality and cross-page consistency                     
  - New command "Suggest schema updates" lets the LLM propose Schema improvements, written to `wiki/schema/suggestions.md` for manual review            
  - Graceful degradation when Schema file is missing — existing functionality is unaffected
                                                                                                                                                        
  ### Auto Maintenance                                                                   
  - **File Watcher**: monitors `sources/` folder for changes, supports notify-only or auto-ingest modes (disabled by default)                           
  - **Periodic Lint**: run Wiki integrity checks hourly, daily, or weekly (disabled by default; skips if no source files have changed since last run)
  - **Startup Check**: Wiki page statistics on plugin load (disabled by default)                                                                        
  - Multi-layer loop protection: 60s debounce cap + plugin self-write markers + 120s write expiry
  - Cost warning banner and Beta badge in settings panel                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                        
  ## Bug Fixes                                                                                                                                          
  - Fix wiki-links not being clickable inside Query Modal                                                                                               
  - Fix MarkdownRenderer lifecycle issue (pass Modal instance instead of Plugin)                                                                        
  - Fix sentence case violations, `as any` casts, unused variables, unhandled promises, and control character regex across multiple files               
  - Fix potential ingest loop when saving Query Modal conversations to Wiki                                                                             
                                                                                                                                                        
  ## Notes                                                                                                                                              
  - All auto-maintenance features are **disabled by default** — enable in settings                                                                      
  - Enabling auto features will incur API costs; review the cost warning in settings before enabling                                                    
  - Schema file is optional — the plugin works normally without it                                                                                      
  - Version tag `1.3.1-beta` — stable release will use `1.3.1`                                                                                          
                                                                                                                                                        
  ## Installation                                                                                                                                       
  Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` and place them in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/llm-wiki/` folder, then reload Obsidian.
releases.name: 1.3.1-beta — Schema Layer + Auto Maintenance

## [1.2.0] - 2026-04-27

### Changed

**Modular Architecture (main.ts 2987 → 305 lines, -90%)**
- Extracted 9 focused modules: wiki-engine, query-engine, settings, texts, types, prompts, llm-client, utils, modals
- Clear separation of concerns: each module has one responsibility
- Plugin entry point now only handles lifecycle and command routing

**Settings Page Redesign**
- Replaced vague feature bullets with 3-step workflow (Ingest → Query → Maintain)
- Merged intro texts into a single paragraph with clickable Karpathy link
- First-time users can understand the plugin in 10 seconds

**Query Modal Polish**
- Increased height from 600px to 780px for better readability
- "Save to Wiki" button now uses Obsidian's accent color (purple)

### Fixed

- JSON parsing: added LLM-based repair fallback for malformed JSON (unescaped quotes, trailing commas)
- Frontmatter: ensure `---` delimiter at position 0 so Obsidian parses YAML correctly
- Removed dead code: empty `selectSourceToIngest()`, unused `streamResponse()`, unused imports
- Replaced brittle regex-based JSON extraction with robust `parseJsonResponse()`
- Replaced `require()` calls with static ES module imports in settings
- Fix code style issues flagged by Obsidian plugin review bot (sentence case, type safety, promise handling). No functional changes.

---

### Added

**Conversational Query Interface**
- Refactored Query Wiki to ChatGPT-style conversational Modal (800x600px)
- Real-time streaming LLM responses with visual feedback
- Full Markdown rendering using Obsidian MarkdownRenderer
  - Supports [[wiki-links]], callouts, code blocks, Obsidian syntax
- Multi-turn conversation with follow-up questions
- Conversation history management with visual scrollable display
- Enter key shortcut (Shift+Enter for newline)
- Auto-truncation when exceeding conversation limit (Notice feedback)
- Clear history button to reset conversation

**Knowledge Extraction from Conversations**
- New "Save to Wiki" button to extract knowledge from valuable conversations
- ingestConversation() method converts dialogue to structured Wiki pages
  - Summary page with conversation topic and key points
  - Entity pages extracted from discussion
  - Concept pages with relationships
- Reuses existing Wiki generation logic for consistency

**Technical Improvements**
- Extended LLMClient interface with optional createMessageStream() method
  - Backward compatible (non-streaming fallback)
- Implemented streaming for AnthropicClient (Anthropic SDK stream API)
- Implemented streaming for OpenAIClient (OpenAI stream: true option)
- Language-aware responses (match interface language setting)
  - English: "Please answer in English."
  - Chinese: "请用中文回答。"
- Added maxConversationHistory to LLMWikiSettings (default: 10)
- New TEXTS entries: 15 strings per language (English + Chinese)
- Settings UI: "Wiki Query Configuration" section
  - Input field with validation (1-50 range)
  - Hint text with recommended value (10-15 rounds)

**User Experience**
- Immediate feedback: see responses stream in real-time
- Interactive: follow-up questions without reopening Modal
- Clean UI: rendered Markdown instead of raw text
- Knowledge capture: save valuable conversations to Wiki
- i18n: all UI text and LLM responses respect language setting

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/green-dalii/obsidian-llm-wiki/commits/1.2.0
releases.name: 1.2.0 - Modular Refactoring
